attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
EX.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
EX.CREATION_DATE ,                
EX.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ,            
EX.ETL_PROCESS_DTM  ,             
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
EX.LATEST_SC_FLAG ,               
EX.ORDER_LINE_ID ,
EX.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
EX.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
EX.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,            
EX.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,                
EX.SALESREP_NUMBER,               
EX.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
EX.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
EX.SC_REASON_CODE,      
EX.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,              
EX.SC_TYPE_CODE ,
EX.SC_UNALLOCATED,                
EX.SC_USAGE_CODE,                 
EX.SHR_NODE_ID ,                  
EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE ,          
EX.TRX_ORIG_CODE ,                
EX.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID ,                    
EX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE ,              
EX.USER_NAME,
EX.ROLLUP_FLAG,
EX.SC_ID,
EX.SC_DUPLICATE_FLAG,
EX.CHANGE_TYPE_CODE,
EX.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG   ,
EX.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
EX.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM,
EX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY,              
EX.TRX_SPLIT_ID     ,             
EX.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY    ,            
EX.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE ,           
EX.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY      ,          
EX.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE   ,         
EX.TOTAL_SPLIT
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_SCA_RMNL_TRX_OLY_RTNR  EX
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SCA_RMNL_TRX_OLY_RTNR  STG
WHERE EX.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID=STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID)

SELECT
SM.SLS_CR_ASSGN_SALES_CREDIT_KEY AS SLS_CR_ASSGN_SALES_CREDIT_KEY,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE AS ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG AS REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG, 
STG.CREATION_DATE AS SCASA_CREATION_DT,
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100) AS SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
'REBOK' AS SS_CD,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT,
NEU.ERP_USER_NAME AS CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
NSAR.MANUAL_TRX_KEY AS  MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
STG.ROLLUP_FLAG  AS ROLLUP_FLG, 
STG.OTM_TERR_ID AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,  
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE AS SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD, 
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED AS SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD AS BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD, 
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_UPDATE_USER,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS START_TV_DTM,
(CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END) END_TV_DTM,
COALESCE(STG.SC_ID,-999) AS SK_SC_ID_INT,
COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
CAST(COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) ) AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
COALESCE(STG.SC_DUPLICATE_FLAG,'N') AS SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG,
COALESCE(STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG,'N') AS LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,
COALESCE(STG.CHANGE_TYPE_CODE,'N') AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
CASE WHEN STG.SC_DUPLICATE_FLAG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,
STG.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG     ,
COALESCE(STG.SALESREP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM,
COALESCE(STG.SHR_NODE_ID,-999)  AS SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT,                    
COALESCE(STG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
COALESCE(TRUNC(STG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME), CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY               AS TRX_SPLIT_BU_ID   ,     
STG.TRX_SPLIT_ID                   AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID_INT          ,  
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY    ,-9999)            AS OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT        ,  
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_1_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT    ,  
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT        , 
COALESCE(RTR.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,-999) AS RTR_ATTRIBUTION_KEY ,
COALESCE((STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT * STG.TOTAL_SPLIT  ),1.000000)   AS TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT  , 
COALESCE(RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS    SALES_MOTION_CD         , 
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='CREDIT' THEN 'I'
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN 'U'
END AS DML_TYPE        
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SCA_RMNL_TRX_OLY_RTNR  STG
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_RMNL_ADJ_RTNR SM
ON STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID=SM.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
ON STG.SC_TYPE_CODE=NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
ON STG.USER_NAME=NEU.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX NSAR
ON STG.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
AND STG.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=TRIM(NSAR.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD)
AND STG.TRX_ORIG_CODE=NSAR.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON STG.SALESREP_NUMBER=CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN'),-999) AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR(30))
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID=NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASGNMNT_REASON NSCAR
ON
STG.SC_REASON_CODE=NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_NRT_TV RTR
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC ) =1
   ) RTR
 ON  STG.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY=RTR.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID

SELECT
STG.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
STG.CREATION_DATE ,                
STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ,            
STG.ETL_PROCESS_DTM  , 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,             
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG ,               
STG.ORDER_LINE_ID ,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE ,           
STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,                 
STG.SALESREP_NUMBER,               
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE ,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
STG.SC_REASON_CODE,          
STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,              
STG.SC_TYPE_CODE , 
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED ,               
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE ,                
STG.SHR_NODE_ID   ,                
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,
STG.TRX_ORIG_CODE,          
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID     ,                
STG.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,               
STG.USER_NAME,
STG.ROLLUP_FLAG,
STG.SC_ID,
STG.SC_DUPLICATE_FLAG,
STG.CHANGE_TYPE_CODE,
STG.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,
STG.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
STG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME , 
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY   ,           
STG.TRX_SPLIT_ID        ,          
STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY       ,         
STG.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE    ,        
STG.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY         ,       
STG.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE      ,      
STG.TOTAL_SPLIT 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SCA_RMNL_TRX_OLY_RTNR STG
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SCA_RBK_MNL_ADJ_OLY_RTNR WK
WHERE STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID=WK.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT)

SELECT 
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SRC.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID) + MAX_VAL SLS_CR_ASSGN_SALES_CREDIT_KEY,
SRC.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SCA_RMNL_TRX_OLY_RTNR SRC,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SLS_CR_ASSGN_SALES_CREDIT_KEY),10000) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_RMNL_ADJ_RTNR
)KEY_SRC
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_RMNL_ADJ_RTNR SM_SCAR
WHERE
SM_SCAR.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT = SRC.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID)
